deposit.title: Deposit Funds
deposit.subtitle: Top up your USDT wallet balance
deposit.secureDesc: Payments are securely processed via Plisio. We support multiple USDT networks (TRC20, BEP20). Your balance updates automatically after blockchain confirmation.

withdraw.title: Withdraw Wallet Balance
withdraw.desc: Securely withdraw your wallet balance. Standard settlement time is usually within 12–24 hours.
withdraw.info: Withdrawal requests are processed via help tickets to verify destination wallets and ensure safety of funds.

loans.noLoansDesc: You have no outstanding or unpaid loans.
